<!-- ---
title: "About Me"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cameronswong/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Camwong6
--- --> 
 <!-- Creates side profile pic -->

<div class="profile-top">
  <img src="profile.png" alt="Profile photo" class="profile-pic">
</div>

# Cameron Wong | Data Analyst {.text-center} 

<div class="profile-links">
  [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cameronswong/){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
  [GitHub](https://github.com/Camwong6){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
</div>


## Philosophy

Put smth here.

## Motivation

I’m motivated by solving meaningful problems and creating impact through data. I’m excited to continue growing my skills and contributing to projects that make a difference. In my free time, I enjoy exploring new technologies, learning about data science, and connecting with others in the field.

## Career interests

Business Intelligence(BI) Analyst | Data Analyst | Consulting | Operations Analyst

## Contact Me
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
### LinkedIn  
https://www.linkedin.com/in/cameronswong/
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
### Email  
cwong63014@gmail.com
:::

::::
